mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-2 — Static Code and Launcher Evidence Bridge

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop=root/r"AGENT_FOX_V1A2"
installed=root/r"System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks=[
    (drop/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1.py", installed/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1.py", "9c1331d04c5973944e1bab3a7177f3035803183236f144610fc6de957ea27b0c"),
    (drop/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1.json", "4c4c434ac1e5e51a776adb87d43eab352a7791a11a2fa219fb3fb3a71870f9e8"),
    (drop/r"README_V1A2.md", installed/r"README_V1A2.md", "5ce41008a8f77e0f6655db24438cd7c781db08766d58e824521c19a1111417ac"),
]
for source,target,expected in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), f"missing package file: {source}"
    assert target.is_file(), f"missing installed file: {target}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"package hash mismatch: {source}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==expected, f"installed hash mismatch: {target}"
script_path=installed/r"static_code_launcher_bridge_v1.py"
script=script_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script,str(script_path),"exec")
tree=ast.parse(script)
imports=set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node,ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split('.')[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node,ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split('.')[0])
forbidden={"subprocess","socket","urllib","http","ftplib","requests","pip","ensurepip","psutil","winreg","ctypes","webbrowser"}
bad=sorted(imports & forbidden)
assert not bad, "forbidden imports: "+", ".join(bad)
for marker in ("subprocess.run(","subprocess.Popen(","os.system(","shell=True","requests.","urlopen(","socket.","pip install","Path.unlink(","shutil.rmtree(","os.remove(","os.rename(","importlib.import_module(","__import__(", "exec("):
    assert marker not in script, "forbidden operation marker: "+marker
contract=json.loads((installed/r"STATIC_CODE_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract.get("schema")=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a2.static_bridge_contract.v1"
safety=contract.get("safety",{})
assert safety.get("network_required") is False
assert safety.get("third_party_dependencies_required") is False
assert safety.get("subprocess_launches") is False
assert safety.get("foxai_imports_or_execution") is False
normalized=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-051832-1CAA3F_V1A1_NORMALIZED"
receipt=json.loads((normalized/r"NORMALIZATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt.get("result")=="normalized_static_manifest_complete"
assert receipt.get("source_evidence_unchanged") is True
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-2 payloads, syntax, standard-library safety boundary, and V1A-1 prerequisite
Run static parser, redaction, path-classification, and batch-expansion self-tests
Build bounded static code, launcher, reference, coverage, and known-good indexes

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, json
root=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
out=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE"
required={"STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json","STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json","STATIC_REFERENCE_INDEX.json","KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json","STATIC_INDEX_COVERAGE.json","STATIC_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json","QUERY_EXAMPLES.md"}
actual={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}
assert required.issubset(actual), f"missing outputs: {sorted(required-actual)}"
loaded={name:json.loads((out/name).read_text(encoding="utf-8")) for name in required if name.endswith('.json')}
receipt=loaded["STATIC_BRIDGE_RECEIPT.json"]
assert receipt.get("result")=="static_code_and_launcher_bridge_complete"
assert receipt.get("mission_id")=="ENG-20260721-053749-E3BE2A"
assert receipt.get("network_used") is False
assert receipt.get("packages_installed") is False
assert receipt.get("foxai_source_imported_or_executed") is False
assert receipt.get("launchers_executed") is False
assert receipt.get("python_interpreters_discovered_or_probed_by_bridge") is False
assert receipt.get("models_loaded") is False
assert receipt.get("existing_foxai_source_modified") is False
assert receipt.get("known_good_candidates_all_match") is True
assert receipt.get("unresolved_launcher_targets_reported_as_confirmed_active")==0
for item in receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
    path=out/item["name"]
    assert path.is_file(), f"receipt output missing: {path}"
    assert path.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"], f"output size mismatch: {path}"
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"], f"output hash mismatch: {path}"
code=loaded["STATIC_CODE_INDEX.json"]
assert code.get("source_imported_or_executed") is False
assert code.get("file_count",0)>0
relative={str(item.get("relative_path",'')).replace('/','\\').casefold() for item in code.get("files",[])}
assert r"core\foxai_web.py".casefold() in relative
assert r"departments\engineering\source_locator.py".casefold() in relative
assert code.get("symbol_count",0)>0
launch=loaded["STATIC_LAUNCHER_INDEX.json"]
assert launch.get("source_launcher_record_count")==536
assert launch.get("record_count")==536
assert launch.get("launchers_executed") is False
assert launch.get("confirmed_active_or_executed_targets")==0
for record in launch.get("records",[]):
    assert record.get("launcher_executed") is False
    for edge in record.get("edges",[]):
        assert edge.get("confirmed_active_or_executed") is False
        if edge.get("unresolved_variables"):
            assert edge.get("confirmation")!="static_existing_target"
known=loaded["KNOWN_GOOD_COMPARISON.json"]
assert known.get("record_count")==6
assert known.get("all_match") is True
assert all(item.get("status")=="match" for item in known.get("records",[]))
coverage=loaded["STATIC_INDEX_COVERAGE.json"]
assert coverage.get("network_used") is False
assert coverage.get("packages_installed") is False
assert coverage.get("foxai_source_imported_or_executed") is False
assert coverage.get("launchers_executed") is False
assert coverage.get("models_loaded") is False
assert coverage.get("source_files_indexed",0)>0
assert coverage.get("source_bytes_read",0)<=coverage.get("source_read_ceiling_bytes",0)+4*1024*1024
references=loaded["STATIC_REFERENCE_INDEX.json"]
assert references.get("line_record_count",0)<=60000
assert isinstance(references.get("symbol_index"),dict)
assert isinstance(references.get("import_index"),dict)
assert isinstance(references.get("setting_index"),dict)
v1=root/r"System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-051832-1CAA3F_V1A1_NORMALIZED"
v1_receipt=json.loads((v1/r"NORMALIZATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for item in v1_receipt.get("core_outputs_before_receipt",[]):
    path=v1/item["name"]
    assert path.is_file(), f"V1A-1 source missing: {path}"
    assert path.stat().st_size==item["size_bytes"]
    assert hashlib.sha256(path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==item["sha256"], f"V1A-1 source changed: {path}"
total=sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())
assert total<=64*1024*1024, f"output ceiling exceeded: {total}"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A2_STATIC_BRIDGE_OUTPUTS_VERIFIED")
validations.name: Verify indexes, exact paths and line evidence, protected hashes, V1A-1 immutability, ceilings, and zero active-target overclaims
Exercise the read-only Trace This Launcher query interface on a known-good launcher
